ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend becomes ex-dividend */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend declared */,
  "max_profit_ex_date" REAL /* Maximum profit realized on the ex-dividend date */,
  "max_profit_within_2_days" REAL /* Maximum profit realized within 2 days of the ex-dividend date */,
  "recovery_chart" TEXT /* Recovery chart data related to the dividend performance */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the dividend */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is recorded */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is paid */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dividend (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "dividend_type" TEXT /* Type of dividend (e.g., cash, stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "dividend_policy" TEXT /* A brief description of the company's dividend policy */,
  "last_dividend_date" TEXT /* The date of the last dividend payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., retail, institutional) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the investor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the investor */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* A brief description of the investor's investment strategy */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* The investor's risk tolerance level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment record */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor making the investment */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being invested in */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "amount_invested" REAL /* Amount invested by the investor */,
  "dividend_received" REAL /* Total dividend received from the investment */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* The number of shares purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* The current value of the investment */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the investment (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date the investment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor setting the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., upcoming dividend, threshold reached) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* The threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* The status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, dismissed) */,
  "alert_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_alerts_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which performance is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The trading volume on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* The opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor associated with the account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor who requested the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., dividend summary, investment performance) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained within the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the report is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)
